---
title: "deseq-2-e-mtab-9479-ovarian-cancer"
author: "ashar"
date: "2026-02-26"
output: html_document
---
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Setup
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r}
#Install packages


if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("DESeq2")

if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install('EnhancedVolcano')

if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("ComplexHeatmap")

if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("fontLiberation")

if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("clusterProfiler")

if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("AnnotationDbi")

if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("org.Hs.eg.db")


if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("tidyverse")


if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("fs")

BiocManager::install(update = TRUE, ask = FALSE)
```


```{r}
#Load library
library(DESeq2)
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(ggplot2)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(fontLiberation)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(tidyverse)
library(circlize)  
library(pheatmap)
library(fs)
```
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Make directory
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r}
parent_dir <- "file"
child_folders <- c("script","plot", "results","data")

# Combine and create all in one step
dir_create(path(parent_dir, child_folders))

```




# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Download data
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
# Download raw counts from EBI
counts = read.delim("https://www.ebi.ac.uk/gxa/experiments-content/E-MTAB-9479/resources/DifferentialSecondaryDataFiles.RnaSeq/raw-counts")
head(counts)

```

```{r}
# Download metadata
metadata = read.delim("https://www.ebi.ac.uk/gxa/experiments-content/E-MTAB-9479/resources/ExperimentDesignFile.RnaSeq/experiment-design")
head(metadata)
```

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Wrangle data for DESeq2
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------



```{r}
# Counts data wrangling
##DESeq expects the counts to have gene IDs as row names
counts$Gene.ID <- as.character(counts$Gene.ID)
rownames(counts) <- counts$Gene.ID
head(counts)
```

```{r}
##Separate gene ID with gene counts
genes = counts[, c("Gene.ID", "Gene.Name"),drop=FALSE]
genes = na.omit(genes) #optional
counts = counts[, -c(1, 2)]
head(counts)

```

```{r}
# Export clean count data
write.csv2(counts, file = "F:/deseq-2-e-mtab-9479-ovarian-cancer/file/data/count_data_clean.csv", row.names=F )

```

```{r}
#Metadata Wrangling
##DESeq expects the metadata matrix to have sample IDs in the rownames
metadata$Run <- as.character(metadata$Run)
rownames(metadata) = metadata$Run
head(metadata)
```

```{r}

##Only keep columns of interest
metadata = metadata[, c("Sample.Characteristic.stimulus."), drop=FALSE] #Drop are used to make data frame with one column
# Look at metadata to see how the variables change with respect to each other
metadata
```


```{r}
##Rename column
colnames(metadata) = "treatment"
```

```{r}
##Turn stimulus/treatment into a factor
metadata$treatment = factor(metadata$treatment, levels =c("BMP2", "PBS"))

```

```{r}
##Export clean metadata
write.csv2(metadata, file = "F:/deseq-2-e-mtab-9479-ovarian-cancer/file/data/metadata_data_clean.csv" )
```

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Run DESeq
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r}
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData=counts, colData=metadata, design=~treatment)

```


```{r}
# Ignore genes with low counts
dds <- dds[rowSums(counts(dds)) >= 10, ]
```

```{r}
# Run DESeq
dds <- DESeq(dds)

```

```{r}
# Compare expression
res <- results(dds, contrast=c("treatment", "BMP2", "PBS"), alpha=0.05)

na.omit(res)

```
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Top 100 gene
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
# Convert DESeq2 result into dataframe
res_df <- as.data.frame(res)
```

```{r}
#Top 100 Gene
##Filter pvalue and Log2FoldChange
res_df_filter <- res_df[(res_df$padj < 0.05) & (abs(res_df$log2FoldChange) >= 1),]
res_df_filter <- na.omit(res_df)

##Ordered padj
top100_gene_ordered <- res_df_filter[order(res_df_filter$padj, res_df_filter$log2FoldChange), ]

##Top100 gene base on padj and fold2 change
top100_gene <- head(top100_gene_ordered, 100)
top100_gene_df <- as.data.frame(top100_gene)

```
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Gene Annotation
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------


```{r}
#Add gene ID column
res_df_filter$Gene.ID <- rownames(res_df_filter)
top100_gene_df$Gene.ID <- rownames(top100_gene_df)
```

```{r}
#Annotate gene ID
res_df_filter$Gene.Names <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db,keys = rownames(res_df_filter), keytype = "ENSEMBL", column = "SYMBOL")

top100_gene_df$Gene.Names <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db,keys = rownames(top100_gene_df), keytype = "ENSEMBL", column = "SYMBOL")
top100_gene_df_annotate <- top100_gene_df


#Remove NA
top100_gene_df_annotate <- na.omit(top100_gene_df_annotate)

```

```{r}
#Export Deseq2 result with annotation to Excel (optional for GO and pathway enrichment)
write.csv2(top100_gene_df_annotate, file="F:/deseq-2-e-mtab-9479-ovarian-cancer/file/results/DESeq2_results_BMP_vs_PBS.csv")
```

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Visualization
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------


# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1.Volcano plot
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
#Set upregulated and Downregulated gene
up <- top100_gene_df_annotate[top100_gene_df_annotate$log2FoldChange > 1 & top100_gene_df_annotate$padj < 0.05,]

#Export upregulated gene
write.csv2(up, file="F:/deseq-2-e-mtab-9479-ovarian-cancer/file/results/top100_gene_upregulated_result.csv")

down <- top100_gene_df_annotate[top100_gene_df_annotate$log2FoldChange < -1 & top100_gene_df_annotate$padj < 0.05, ]

#Export downregulated gene
write.csv2(down, file="F:/deseq-2-e-mtab-9479-ovarian-cancer/file/results/top100_gene_downregulated_result.csv")

```

```{r}
#Merge upregulated and downregulated gene
top100_gene_bind <- rbind(up, down)
```

```{r}
#Enhanced volcano
enhancedvolcano <- EnhancedVolcano(
  top100_gene_df_annotate,
  lab      = top100_gene_df_annotate$Gene.Names,
  x        = 'log2FoldChange',
  y        = 'padj',
  selectLab = top100_gene_bind$Gene.Names,
  
  # Title & subtitle
  title    = "Top 100 Gene Expression of BMP Signaling in Ovarian Cancer",
  subtitle = paste0("p-adj < 0.05  |  |log2FC| > 2"),
  
  # Thresholds
  pCutoff  = 0.05,
  FCcutoff = 2,
  
  # Label styling
  labSize         = 3.5,
  drawConnectors  = TRUE,      # lines from label to dot
  widthConnectors = 0.4,
  
  # Point styling
  pointSize = 2.0,
  colAlpha  = 0.7,
  
  # Colors: NS, log2FC only, p only, significant
  col = c("grey70", "steelblue", "orange", "red2"),
  
  # Legend
  legendPosition = "right",
  legendLabSize  = 10,
  
  # Theme
  gridlines.major = FALSE,
  gridlines.minor = FALSE
)
enhancedvolcano
```

```{r}
#Export result image
png("F:/deseq-2-e-mtab-9479-ovarian-cancer/file/plot/volcano_plot.png", 
    res    = 300, 
    height = 3000, 
    width  = 3000,
    units  = "px",      # explicitly state pixels
    bg     = "white")   # white background (not transparent)

print(enhancedvolcano)
dev.off()
```
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2.Heatmap
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------


```{r}

# 1. Extract normalized counts for your genes
mat <- counts(dds, normalized = TRUE)[rownames(top100_gene_df_annotate), ]
mat <- mat[!is.na(rownames(mat)), ]

# ── Annotate Ensembl IDs → gene symbols ──────────────────────────────────────
symbols <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db,
                  keys      = rownames(mat),
                  column    = "SYMBOL",
                  keytype   = "ENSEMBL",
                  multiVals = "first")

# Remove NAs and empty symbols
symbols <- symbols[!is.na(symbols) & symbols != ""]
mat     <- mat[names(symbols), ]
rownames(mat) <- symbols

# 2. Z-score scale by row (gene-wise)
mat_scaled <- t(scale(t(mat)))

# 3. Define color mapping centered on 0
col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(-2, 0, 2),
  c("blue", "white", "red")
)

# ── Define sample groups ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
group_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Group = c(
    ERR4507912 = "BMP",
    ERR4507913 = "BMP",
    ERR4507911 = "BMP",
    ERR4507914 = "PBS/Control",
    ERR4507916 = "PBS/Control",
    ERR4507915 = "PBS/Control"
  )[colnames(mat_scaled)],
  col = list(
    Group = c(
      "BMP"         = "#E64B35",   # red
      "PBS/Control" = "#4DBBD5"    # blue
    )
  ),
  annotation_label = "Group",
  annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9, fontface = "bold")
)

# 4. Build heatmap
heatmap <- Heatmap(
  mat_scaled,
  name             = "Z-score",
  col              = col_fun,
  # Column annotation (group bar on top)
  top_annotation   = group_annotation,        # ← group bar added here
  # Row settings
  cluster_rows     = TRUE,
  show_row_dend    = TRUE,
  row_labels       = rownames(mat_scaled),
  row_names_gp     = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  # Column settings
  cluster_columns  = TRUE,
  column_labels    = colnames(mat_scaled),
  column_names_rot = 45,
  column_names_gp  = gpar(fontsize = 9),
  # Title
  column_title     = "Top 100 Gene Expression of BMP Signaling in Ovarian Cancer",
  column_title_gp  = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold"),
  # Misc
  show_row_names    = TRUE,
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title  = "Z-score",
    at     = c(-2, -1, 0, 1, 2),
    labels = c("-2", "-1", "0", "1", "2")
  )
)

```

```{r}
#Export result image
png("F:/deseq-2-e-mtab-9479-ovarian-cancer/file/plot/heatmap_top100.png", 
    res    = 300, 
    height = 5000, 
    width  = 5000,
    units  = "px",      # explicitly state pixels
    bg     = "white")   # white background (not transparent)

print(heatmap)
dev.off()

```
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# GO Enrichment and KEGG pathways
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
#Take data to test
genes_to_test <- rownames(top100_gene_df_annotate)

```

```{r}
#GO Analysis
GO_results_BP <- enrichGO(gene = genes_to_test, OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db", keyType = "ENSEMBL", ont = "BP", pvalueCutoff = 0.5)
GO_results_MF <- enrichGO(gene = genes_to_test, OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db", keyType = "ENSEMBL", ont = "MF", pvalueCutoff = 0.5)
GO_results_CC <- enrichGO(gene = genes_to_test, OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db", keyType = "ENSEMBL", ont = "CC", pvalueCutoff = 0.5)

```

```{r}

#GO barplot
fit_BP <- plot(barplot(GO_results_BP, showCategory = 20))
fit_MF <- plot(barplot(GO_results_MF, showCategory = 20))
fit_CC <- plot(barplot(GO_results_CC, showCategory = 20))
```

```{r}
#Export GO barplot
png("F:/deseq-2-e-mtab-9479-ovarian-cancer/file/plot/GO barplot_BP.png", res = 300, width=3000, height = 5000)
print(fit_BP)

dev.off()

png("F:/deseq-2-e-mtab-9479-ovarian-cancer/file/plot/GO barplot_MF.png", res = 300, width=3000, height = 5000)
print(fit_MF)

dev.off()

png("F:/deseq-2-e-mtab-9479-ovarian-cancer/file/plot/GO barplot_CC.png", res = 300, width=3000, height = 5000)
print(fit_CC)

dev.off()

```

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# KEGG Pathway Enrichment
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
# Convert Ensembl IDs to Entrez IDs (required by enrichKEGG)
entrez_ids <- mapIds(
  org.Hs.eg.db,
  keys     = rownames(top100_gene_df_annotate),
  keytype  = "ENSEMBL",
  column   = "ENTREZID",
  multiVals = "first"
)

# Remove NAs
entrez_ids <- na.omit(entrez_ids)
```

```{r}
# KEGG enrichment analysis
kegg_results <- enrichKEGG(
  gene          = entrez_ids,
  organism      = "hsa",       # Homo sapiens
  pvalueCutoff  = 0.05,
  qvalueCutoff  = 0.2
)
```

```{r}
# Barplot - top 20 KEGG pathways
kegg_barplot <- barplot(kegg_results, showCategory = 20) +
  labs(title = "KEGG Pathway Enrichment (BMP vs PBS)",
       x = "Gene Count")

kegg_barplot
```

```{r}
```

```{r}
# Export KEGG plots
png("F:/deseq-2-e-mtab-9479-ovarian-cancer/file/plot/KEGG_barplot.png",
    res = 300, width = 3000, height = 4000, units = "px", bg = "white")
print(kegg_barplot)
dev.off()

```

```{r}
# Export KEGG results table
write.csv2(
  as.data.frame(kegg_results),
  file = "F:/deseq-2-e-mtab-9479-ovarian-cancer/file/results/KEGG_results.csv"
)
```

```{r}
#Save R environemnt(optional)
save.image(file = "deseq-2-e-mtab-9479-ovarian-cancer.RData")
```
